title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 81.170 - Condemnation of private property (cities of 10,000 to 30,000)
text:
81.170.  Condemnation of private property (cities of 10,000 to 30,000). — Any such city may condemn private property for public use for such purposes as they are now by law authorized to condemn the same and as provided by chapter 88.
(RSMo 1939 § 7481) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7328; 1919 § 8742
